sections.title: Nen tang va khoi tao
sections.description: Dung de mo server local, trich xuat du lieu game va quet text truoc khi vao cac phase viet hoa.

actions.label: Mo Dashboard Local
actions.summary: Khoi dong local control center de thao tac bang UI.

actions.label: Trich xuat du lieu game
actions.summary: Lay XML, font va UI asset tu cac file pak vao thu muc input/output.
actions.coverage: Toan bo du lieu game can cho viet hoa

actions.label: Quet toan bo text
actions.summary: Thong ke cac chuoi co the dich va giup xac dinh pham vi cong viec.
actions.coverage: Toan bo text XML co the viet hoa

actions.label: Tao queue viet hoa toan bo
actions.summary: Tao queue cong viec cho full translation, bo qua text da duoc dich.

sections.title: Phase 1 - UI, tips, radio, todo
sections.description: Bao phu text can thiet nhat de vao game khong bi mu UI va loading tip.

actions.label: Tao queue Phase 1
actions.summary: Tao queue cho embeddedstrings, hints, radiooptions va todolist.
actions.coverage: UI runtime, loading tips, radio command, crisis/todo

actions.label: Chay dich Phase 1
actions.summary: Dich batch phase 1 bang Gemini, co cache va fallback model.

actions.label: Bao cao tien do Phase 1
actions.summary: Xem % da dich cua phase 1 tren cac file gameplay som.

sections.title: Phase 2 - Mission, objective, hoi thoai
sections.description: Tap trung vao story, objective va noi dung campaign mo dau den giua game.

actions.label: Tao queue Phase 2
actions.summary: Tao queue cho missions.xml va scenes.xml.

actions.label: Chay dich Phase 2
actions.summary: Dich mission va hoi thoai theo batch, co fallback va resume.

sections.title: Phase 3 - Item, survivor, facility, RTS
sections.description: Bao phu inventory, ky nang, nhan vat, co so va event he thong de choi tron ven.

actions.label: Tao queue Phase 3
actions.summary: Tao queue cho item, character, facility va cac file RTS.
actions.coverage: Items, characters, facilities, expertise, rts events

actions.label: Chay dich Phase 3
actions.summary: Dich item, trait, skill, base management va world system text.

sections.title: Van hanh toan bo
sections.description: Dung khi muon chay full translation pipeline, tiep tuc neu bi ngat giua chung.

actions.label: Chay viet hoa toan bo
actions.summary: Full translation pipeline co resume, fallback, rollback va dashboard progress.
actions.coverage: Tat ca phase con lai trong queue

actions.label: Tiep tuc viet hoa (khong tao lai queue)
actions.summary: Tiep tuc tu dung dang — giu nguyen pending jobs, khong reset queue. Dung khi bi crash hoac stop bat ngo.
actions.coverage: Cac job con lai trong queue hien tai

actions.label: Bao cao tien do toan bo
actions.summary: Xem % viet hoa tren toan bo he thong file XML.

actions.label: Lam moi dashboard data
actions.summary: Sinh lai file bao cao JSON de UI cap nhat du lieu moi nhat.

sections.title: Build va dua vao game
sections.description: Dung sau khi co ket qua dich de build file game thuc te va copy vao folder game.

actions.label: Build english.win.btxt
actions.summary: Patch text da dich vao file ngôn ngu game dung thuc te.

actions.label: Copy output vao game
actions.summary: Dong bo file output hien tai vao dung folder game theo manifest.
actions.coverage: Deployment local de test trong game

actions.label: Rollback output gan nhat
actions.summary: Khoi phuc cac file output tu backup gan nhat neu build/dich co van de.

sections.title: Font va UI patch
sections.description: Nhom cong cu de patch font/UI khi can fix hien thi tieng Viet trong menu, popup va HUD.

actions.label: Build font body SWF
actions.summary: Tao file font body de UI co the dung glyph tieng Viet.

actions.label: Build UI aliases
actions.summary: Tao cac file alias SWF cho UI runtime.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster A
actions.summary: Patch frontend/menu confirmation cluster sang font viet hoa.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster B
actions.summary: Patch gameplay pause/alert/menu cluster sang glyph Arial.

actions.label: Patch font Cluster C
actions.summary: Patch journal va stats cluster sang glyph tieng Viet.

sections.title: Test va chan doan
sections.description: Dung khi can thu nghiem nhanh mot gia thuyet hoac kiem tra output cu the.

actions.label: Kiem tra font audit
actions.summary: Quet cac asset font/UI de xem noi nao dang embed/import font.

actions.label: Test XML menu
actions.summary: Thu nghiem thay doi menu XML nhanh de debug.

actions.label: Test BTXT
actions.summary: Thu patch nho english.win.btxt de kiem tra pipeline text.

actions.label: Test font file
actions.summary: Thu copy font vao output de test glyph tieng Viet.

actions.label: Test GFX font
actions.summary: Thu patch nhanh font vao class3_frontend.gfx.
